AND THEN ! when i was three, i hid in the closet. it was dark.   AND THEN ! when i was four, i wished i was a muppet. AND THEN! when i was five, i ate KEROSENE . AND THEN ! when i was eight, i played a game of basketball. jeffrey won. AND THEN ! when i was thirteen, i ate a sandwich. it had ham on it. but no mayonnaise. i dislike mayonnaise. AND THEN ! when i was seventeen, i lost my head. AND THEN ! when i was thirty-four, i found it. AND THE...

larry.title: LARRY SUSAN JIM
larry.subtitle: biographical fire / television
larry.body: Susan was born in 1931. She never left her home town of Farmington. Larry loved television. He left it on one night, and it started the house on fire. He died in that fire. The show he was watching was Rescue 911.

gerald.body: Dear Friends, our dear son Gerald has never returned from his fishing trip. UPDATE. GERALD HAS DIED. AND SO WILL YOU. the police have been contacted.

residue.body: Residue is the app remembering what you touched. It is not score. It is contamination.

broadcastpanic.title: EMERGENCY BROADCAST
broadcastpanic.subtitle: this is not a test / this is not a conclusion
broadcastpanic.body: If you are seeing this, the station has confused you with the local signal. Do not seek shelter. The shelter is one of the rooms. The crawl will now repeat until the app forgets what television was.

channelstatic.subtitle: not maze / not television / wrong layer
channelstatic.body: The archive stops being a website and becomes whatever was left on after midnight.

tv_alley.subtitle: crt snow / syringes / wrong broadcast
tv_alley.body: Here we were (all alone). The television was on again.

make_awesome_news.body: A POSITIVE FORCE IN A NEGATIVE WORLD. Beau Lou speaks. Kensington kills again. The footer still routes to the archive.

tv_heaven.subtitle: basement / crt graveyard / arrow down
tv_heaven.body: TV HEAVEN. Dozens of sets. Most show snow. One is paused on a MAL night game.

septa_allegheny.body: Fluorescent hum. Trash can overflow. Something always glints on the steps.

el_bar.subtitle: frankford av / neon / est 1963
el_bar.body: Cold beer good times. Ground scores under the bench and in the crosswalk gutter.

mattress_lot.title: VACANT LOT
mattress_lot.subtitle: mattress / chain link / purple dusk
mattress_lot.body: Someone slept on the mattress. The lot keeps giving up ground scores.

panhandle.title: K & A CORNER
panhandle.subtitle: kensington av / pawn shop / crosswalk
panhandle.body: K & A Food Market. Kensington Pawn. Sit on the crosswalk until they look away.

pawn_shop.title: KENSINGTON PAWN
pawn_shop.subtitle: cash loans gold / glass case / loan drawer
pawn_shop.body: The window keeps lottery tickets like trophies. Griffey card under fluorescent guilt.

underpass.title: KENSINGTON UNDERPASS
underpass.subtitle: kensington av 2800 / wet tunnel / crosswalk
underpass.body: Stay in lane. No pedestrians. Sit on the zebra stripes until someone looks away.

record_store.title: SIGNAL STATIC
record_store.subtitle: frankford av / vinyl wall / buy retail
record_store.body: Buy records at full price. Sell them back poorer.

japan_doll_basement.title: JAPAN DOLL BASEMENT

japan_doll_basement.body: Japan Doll banner drips red. Infest Integrity Unbroken on the walls. Almost nobody finds the stairs.

salvage_sitemap.body: A folder that should not exist on the original site. It routes into Philadelphia debris and salvage logic.

money.title: MONEY

children.title: CHILDREN

puzzle.title: PUZZLE

sourceleak.title: SOURCE LEAK
sourceleak.subtitle: php / sql guts
sourceleak.body: The site accidentally opened its own stomach.

meridian_incomplete_file.title: INCOMPLETE BIOGRAPHY
meridian_incomplete_file.subtitle: Daniel Mercer / Dust Meridian / wrong filenames
meridian_incomplete_file.body: THE LIFE OF DUST MERIDIAN — recovered biography file. Status: incomplete. Contradictions preserved on purpose. Daniel Mercer. Dust Meridian. Kyle Mercer died 2019. Some rooms invert the twin. Some pretend he was alone.

meridian_1982.title: SHARD / BORN 1982
meridian_1982.subtitle: wrong footer on /dead index
meridian_1982.body:
Born 1982, Long Beach. Legal name Daniel Mercer. After middle school almost nobody used it.

—

OTHER PARAGRAPHS ATTACHED WITHOUT PERMISSION:

【LARRY'S WIDOW MISFILED THIS PARAGRAPH】 The apartment backed onto an alley. He kept bottle caps and rain-warped receipts in a box under the bed labeled CHRISTMAS LIGHTS.

【NORDIC DRIFT MISROUTE】 Never north of Oregon but talked about Iceland, Greenland, Finland. Shackleton photocopies folded in notebooks.

【KENSINGTON WALL WRITING】 Winter in Philadelphia clearing mold apartments. Cough that stayed. TB raised once; paperwork never matched.

meridian_alley.title: SHARD / ALLEY BOX
meridian_alley.subtitle: Larry's widow misfiled this paragraph
meridian_alley.body:
The apartment backed onto an alley. He kept bottle caps and rain-warped receipts in a box under the bed labeled CHRISTMAS LIGHTS.

—

OTHER PARAGRAPHS ATTACHED WITHOUT PERMISSION:

【MRS. VAN RAVENSWAY DUPLICATE】 Fourth-grade report card: Daniel appears to be somewhere else entirely. He drew maps of dead malls and harbors that froze.

【LARRY TELEVISION FILE OVERLAP】 2001 overdose scare. Nobody died. They photographed cemeteries anyway. He started lists of everyone who vanished.

【GERALD'S MOTHER INSISTS THIS IS ABOUT FISHING】 High school: oversized hoodies under black leather jackets regardless of weather. Gaylord and Jeffrey 2. Sonic Youth on Maxell tapes.

meridian_maps.title: SHARD / REPORT CARD
meridian_maps.subtitle: Mrs. Van Ravensway duplicate
meridian_maps.body:
Fourth-grade report card: Daniel appears to be somewhere else entirely. He drew maps of dead malls and harbors that froze.

—

OTHER PARAGRAPHS ATTACHED WITHOUT PERMISSION:
